title: Skylife
description: A Skyblock with the goal to make everything different (at least a bit)
body:
Skylife is a tech-based skyblock mod designed to create an unique skyblock experience. From simply cooking your items with an electric furnace to creating highly complex automation machines, you can build everything you want with brand new machines offered exclusively in this mod. But no worries if you're not into tech, there are mysterious loot gems you can obtain by killing different mobs. They might give you some interesting items...

Ever wondered how you get basic resources? Besides early game hammering, there are some suspicious sheeps wearing something else than wool...
